title: Minecraft HD(64x) Brighter Nether Add-On
description: This is an add-on for the Minecraft HD (64x) resource pack, featuring brighter textures for many of the nether-based blocks.
body:
This is an add-on for the Minecraft HD (64x) resource pack, featuring brighter textures for many of the nether-based blocks.

This pack does not need a mod like Optifine or Continuity to work - it will work fine with the vanilla (unmodded) client.

The idea for this pack, and the initial model contributions, came from members of our Discord server, with inspiration from [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/).
